race.description: Casterton Sandford Football Netball Club (Bm56) Hcp
race.comment: THE KILL CLUB (1) missed the placings two starts back then ran a better race and finished 2.75 lengths away in fourth last time out over 1200m at Donald after being in the firing line on the turn. Was a nice winner at Warrnambool during the carnival and if he can get back to that form he'll be tough to beat. STARGUST (4) ran a typically honest race fresh last start, finding only one better, and any improvement from that has him right in this. MELISSA KATE (12) looks close to a win, finishing in the placings at her last couple of runs including a third most recently over 1200m at Mt Gambier when beaten 1.2 lengths. Today might be her day. BRUTIFY (7) resumes and can contest for a place.
